zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Plumpton於1400年出生時，她的父親Sir William Plumpton35歲，母親Alice Gisburn37歲。她和Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Plumpton于1400年出生时，她的父亲Sir William Plumpton35岁，母亲Alice Gisburn37岁。她和Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1470年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Plumpton was born in 1400, her father, Sir William Plumpton, was 35 and her mother, Alice Gisburn, was 37. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall. She died in 1470, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Plumpton est née en 1400, son père, Sir William Plumpton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Gisburn, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Plumpton 1400 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Plumpton 35 und ihre Mutter Alice Gisburn 37. Sie hatte mit Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Plumpton è nata il nel 1400, sua padre, Sir William Plumpton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice Gisburn, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall. Morì nel 1470, nel Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Plumptonが1400年に生まれた時，父Sir William Plumptonは35歳，母Alice Gisburnは37歳であった。彼女はSir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hallとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバドミントンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Plumpton(이)가 1400년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Plumpton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Gisburn(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Plumpton родилась в 1400 г., её отцу по имени Sir William Plumpton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Gisburn, 37.
